title: From Viral MP To Silence? A Look Back At Raghav Chadha’s Sharpest Interventions In Parliament
description: Raghav Chadha’s interventions in Parliament often revolved around everyday concerns. From flagging the plight of gig workers, to questioning financial and policy decisions affecting the middle class, to ‘unfair’ telecom practices, to highlighting menstrual health and paternity leave, his speeches frequently struck a chord online.
